name: writeback_frames
short_description: Create a partial bitstream to modify selected frames in a bitfile
full_help:
writeback_frames

Description: 
Create a partial bitstream to modify selected frames in a bitfile

Syntax: 
writeback_frames  -reference_file <arg> -update_file <arg> [-force] [-quiet]
                  [-verbose] <file>

Usage: 
  Name             Description
  ----------------------------
  -reference_file  Input bitfile (.bit or .rbt)
  -update_file     File containing details of bits to be modified
  [-force]         Overwrite existing file
  [-quiet]         Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]       Suspend message limits during command execution
  <file>           Output partial bitfile (.bit, .bin or .rbt)

Categories: 
FileIO

arguments.description: File containing details of bits to be modified
Suspend message limits during command execution
